title: The faith
description: The mod adds the struggle between good and evil to Minecraft. Choose the side of the occultists or the priests
body:
# ☩ The Faith ☩

> *"Two paths lie before you. Choose wisely — or choose power."*

---

## What is The Faith?

**The Faith** is a dark and atmospheric Minecraft mod that introduces a deep **dual-faction system** — the light of Christianity and the shadow of Satanism. Every choice you make shapes your path, your powers, and your fate.

This is not a magic mod. This is a **roleplay experience** built around belief, sacrifice, and consequence.

---

## ✝ The Path of Light

Wield the **Holy Bible** — a sacred tome that channels divine mana through prayer and righteousness.

- **Heal** nearby allies with holy energy
- **Empower** yourself with divine strength, speed and resistance  
- **Bless** the afflicted, cleansing curses and harmful effects
- **Cure** Zombie Villagers and return them to the living
- **Hold the Cross** to burn monsters with holy fire

> The light protects. But it demands purity.  
> *Sign the Pact — and the Bible turns to ash in your hands.*

---

## ☩ The Path of Darkness

Seal your soul with **Satan's Contract** — and unlock power that no prayer can grant.

- **The Dagger** — harvest mana from blood. Kill animals, villagers, players. Or sacrifice your own flesh.
- **The Voodoo Doll** — bind a player's name to the doll. Throw it in fire, water, cobwebs or ice. Watch them suffer from afar.
- **Pentagram Rituals** — five ancient circles, each demanding a different sacrifice:
  - 🌑 **Night** — lock the world in eternal darkness
  - 👁 **Pact** — neutralize all monsters around you
  - ⚡ **Satan** — call down divine judgment. Lightning. Death.
  - 🩸 **Wish** — offer blood, speak an item's name, receive it
  - 💀 **Blessing** — cheat death itself. Die once. Wake up in the Nether.

> The darkness gives. But it never forgives.

---

## ⚔ A World Divided

The two factions are not just mechanics — they are **at war**.

- Villagers **refuse to trade** with those who bear the Mark of Satan
- Sacred foods **burn** the tongues of the unholy
- Every player bears a **faction tag** above their name — ✝ white for the faithful, ☩ red for the damned
- The **Ritual Knife** — a weak blade that steals the soul's experience on kill

---

## 🩸 Blood System

Blood is currency in the dark economy.

Slay creatures with the Dagger while holding a **Glass Bottle** — and collect their blood.  
Three tiers of Blood Bottles fuel the most powerful rituals.  
Found rarely in dungeons, temples and bastions — or harvested yourself.

---

## 📦 Found in the World

Dark artifacts do not come easily.

| Item | Location | Chance |
|---|---|---|
| The Dagger | Strongholds, Pyramids, Ancient Cities | ~2.5% |
| Blood Bottle I | Dungeons, Mineshafts, Villages | ~15% |
| Blood Bottle II | Bastions, Strongholds, Ancient Cities | ~5% |

---

## 🔧 Technical

- **Minecraft:** 1.20.1
- **Forge:** 47.4.0
- **Multiplayer safe:** fully server-side logic
- **Languages:** English 🇬🇧 / Russian 🇷🇺
